'''Warb''' was an ambidexterious [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] mechanic. He worked for [[Shug Ninx]] in a repair shop in the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the ''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]'', Warb is misidentified as [[Warb Null]] in [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo's]] entry.
